'''Pokkta''' was a kind of plant originating from the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Bakura/Legends|Bakura]]. During the [[Invasion of Bakura]]<ref name="Truce" /> in [[4 ABY/Legends|4 ABY]],<ref name="ERC">''[[The Essential Reader's Companion]]''</ref> [[Senator/Legends|senator]] [[Gaeriel Captison]] had watched [[Water/Legends|rain]] fall on pokkta leaves in the morning before an emergency evening call with [[Governor/Legends|Governor]] [[Wilek Nereus]].<ref name="Truce" />

==Appearances==
*''[[The Truce at Bakura]]''
